resultList.dtldesc: Experience elevated living in this spacious 3 BHK apartment located in Kollur, Hyderabad, near ORR Exit 2 and Gaudium School. Positioned on the top floor of a modern residential tower, this east-facing apartment offers impressive open views, excellent ventilation, and access to premium lifestyle amenities. Ideal for families seeking a peaceful yet well-connected residential environment, the property combines comfort, convenience, and contemporary community living.::Property Specifications::Situated on the 17th floor of a 17-storey building, this ready-to-move apartment offers a carpet area of 1300 sq. ft with a thoughtfully planned layout suitable for modern family living. The flat includes three spacious bedrooms, three bathrooms, and three independent balconies that enhance natural light and airflow throughout the residence.::Each balcony is attached separately to the master bedroom, guest bedroom, and living room, offering pleasant open views overlooking the Kollur village fields and surrounding greenery. The apartment features a combined living and dining area that creates a spacious and functional interior layout.::The kitchen is designed in a practical format with a granite platform and stainless steel sink. Piped gas connectivity is available, supporting everyday convenience. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to personalise interiors according to their preferences.::Vitrified flooring is used consistently across the residence, providing a clean and elegant finish. The flat is vastu compliant and east facing, making it highly desirable for homeowners seeking natural light and positive spatial orientation.::All three bathrooms are fitted in western style, with two attached bathrooms and one common washroom. The property also includes one covered parking space for secure vehicle accommodation.::Facilities::Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, four lifts, CCTV surveillance, and round-the-clock security for enhanced convenience and safety. The gated community also offers reserved parking and visitor parking facilities.::The project includes an extensive range of lifestyle amenities such as a clubhouse, swimming pool, banquet hall with lawns, badminton court, tennis court, squash court, cricket nets, and amphitheatre, creating a vibrant and active residential environment suitable for families.::Locality::Located in Kollur, Hyderabad, the property enjoys strong connectivity to major educational institutions and transport hubs. Gaudium School and Birla Open Minds School are situated nearby, making the location highly convenient for families with children.::Nagulapalli Railway Station is accessible from the property, while Lingampally MMTS Station is approximately 15 minutes away, supporting easy daily commuting. The apartment also benefits from quick access to ORR Exit 2, improving connectivity to major IT hubs, business districts, and other parts of Hyderabad.

Situated on the 13th floor of a 14-storey tower, this residence spans a super built-up area of 1625 sq. ft and provides an elevated living experience with sweeping, unobstructed views of the surrounding landscape. The property is a ready-to-move-in unit within an exclusive gated community that emphasises open space and modern design. With its strategic location and high-rise advantage, this apartment is perfectly suited for professionals and families seeking a sophisticated lifestyle in a rapidly growing part of the city.::::Property Specifications::The apartment is designed with a spacious and functional layout featuring three bedrooms and three bathrooms. As a west-facing unit, it is meticulously planned to ensure maximum natural light and cross-ventilation, being completely open on two sides. The interiors are currently unfurnished, finished with durable ceramic tile flooring, which provides a versatile foundation for bespoke interior design. This high-floor positioning ensures a quiet environment and fresh air, making it one of the most desirable units within the complex.::::Facilities::The Sumadhuras Gardens By The Brook project is equipped with an extensive range of premium facilities within its 76 percent open-area layout. Essential services including a 24-hour water supply, reliable power backup, and high-speed lifts are standard. Additional amenities include a multipurpose hall and a dedicated kids' play area, all within a secure and professionally managed gated environment.::::Locality::Satamrai is a strategically located neighbourhood in South Hyderabad, enjoying superior connectivity to major transport corridors. The area is well-served by essential social infrastructure and is approximately 30 minutes away from the city's major commercial hubs. Its blend of connectivity and high-growth potential makes Satamrai an increasingly popular choice for modern homeowners.

resultList.dtldesc: This 3 BHK multistorey apartment in Puppalaguda offers a sophisticated residential experience in one of Hyderabad's most rapidly developing and strategic localities. Designed for modern urban living, the property combines architectural elegance with a highly functional layout, making it an ideal choice for families and professionals seeking a premium home in the city's Western corridor. The residence is situated within a well-planned development that prioritises both comfort and accessibility to the city’s major commercial hubs.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features a spacious super area of 1,500 sq. ft, meticulously designed to ensure optimal space utilisation and a seamless flow between rooms. The layout comprises three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, each finished with high-quality fixtures. Large windows and thoughtfully placed balconies allow for abundant natural light and excellent cross-ventilation, creating a bright and airy atmosphere throughout the day. The interior spaces are finished with premium flooring and contemporary aesthetics, providing a refined setting for both relaxation and entertaining.::::Facilities::Residents of this multistorey development benefit from a comprehensive range of facilities designed to support a high standard of living. The project includes 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance and manned entry points to ensure a safe environment for all inhabitants. Essential amenities such as dedicated car parking, high-speed elevators, and a consistent water supply are provided. For recreation and fitness, the community often features a well-equipped gymnasium, a clubhouse, and landscaped green zones. The infrastructure is built to modern standards, ensuring power backup for common areas and professional maintenance of the premises.::::Locality::Located in Puppalaguda, the property enjoys exceptional connectivity to the Financial District, HITEC City, and the Outer Ring Road (ORR), making daily commutes to major IT parks highly efficient. The neighbourhood has emerged as a premier residential destination, offering a peaceful environment while remaining close to the city's primary social infrastructure. Residents have easy access to reputed international schools, multi-speciality hospitals, and vibrant shopping malls. The area’s strategic location ensures that all essential services and recreational options are within a short distance, providing a well-rounded urban lifestyle.
